quote: adequate organ function as determined by the investigator
concern: No objective thresholds defined. 'Adequate' is open to investigator interpretation, creating inconsistency across sites.
suggested_fix: Replace with specific lab value thresholds (e.g., ALT <= 3x ULN, creatinine <= 1.5x ULN) as per ICH E6 R2 guidance.

concern: 'Recently' lacks a defined timeframe. FDA reviewers routinely flag washout periods without explicit day/week counts.
suggested_fix: Define a specific washout window (e.g., 'within 14 days prior to enrollment').

quote: women of childbearing potential must use contraception
concern: No definition of 'adequate contraception' provided. ICH E8 R1 requires specifying acceptable method categories and duration relative to last dose.
suggested_fix: Add a contraception definition section listing acceptable methods and specify duration of use post-treatment (e.g., 6 months after last dose).
